name: Everest Base Camp Trek
description: Walk through Sherpa villages to the foot of the world's highest mountain. Life changing.

name: Annapurna Circuit
description: Circles the entire Annapurna massif crossing Thorong La pass at 5416m through diverse landscapes.

name: Mardi Himal Trek
description: Nepal's best kept secret with stunning Annapurna views and a fraction of the EBC crowds.

name: Poon Hill Trek
description: Most popular short trek in Nepal with stunning sunrise views over the Annapurna range.

name: Langtang Valley Trek
description: The valley of glaciers offers stunning Himalayan scenery with authentic Tamang culture.

name: Upper Mustang Trek
description: Trekking through the forbidden kingdom of Lo with ancient caves and Tibetan Buddhist culture.

name: Chadar Trek
description: Walking on the frozen Zanskar River in Ladakh winter with temperatures dropping to -30C.

name: Valley of Flowers
description: UNESCO World Heritage valley in Uttarakhand bursts with hundreds of wildflower species during monsoon.

name: Kedarkantha Trek
description: India's best winter trek through dense snow-covered pine forests with panoramic Himalayan summit views.

name: Sandakphu Trek
description: The only place to see four of the world's five highest peaks simultaneously from West Bengal.

name: Hampta Pass Trek
description: Dramatic crossover trek from green Kullu valley to barren Spiti landscape through a high mountain pass.

name: Dzukou Valley Trek
description: Hidden valley on the Nagaland-Manipur border covered in seasonal flowers with almost no tourists.

name: Roopkund Trek
description: Trek to a mysterious glacial lake filled with ancient human skeletons at 5029m in Uttarakhand.

name: Markha Valley Trek
description: Classic Ladakh trek through remote villages beneath Kang Yatze peak with stunning desert mountain scenery.

name: Pin Parvati Pass Trek
description: One of India's most challenging crossover treks connecting green Parvati valley with barren Pin valley.

name: Kheerganga Trek
description: Easy Himalayan trek ending at natural hot springs and camping meadows in Parvati Valley.

name: Inca Trail
description: Four-day archaeological trek through cloud forests ending at Machu Picchu at sunrise.

name: Torres del Paine W Trek
description: Patagonia's most iconic trek past jagged granite towers and turquoise glacial lakes in howling winds.

name: Laugavegur Trail
description: Iceland's celebrated trek through lunar landscapes of colorful rhyolite mountains and geothermal areas.

name: Milford Track
description: New Zealand's finest walk through ancient rainforests and dramatic fiordland to Milford Sound.

name: Tour du Mont Blanc
description: Legendary circuit around Mont Blanc through France, Italy and Switzerland with dramatic alpine scenery.

name: GR20
description: Europe's toughest long-distance trail across Corsica's granite spine with wild camping and mountain refuges.

name: Camino de Santiago
description: Ancient pilgrim route ending at Santiago de Compostela cathedral walking through Galician villages.

name: John Muir Trail
description: Classic Sierra Nevada wilderness trail from Yosemite to Mount Whitney through breathtaking alpine terrain.

name: Appalachian Trail
description: Epic 2190-mile trail from Georgia to Maine through 14 states and America's eastern wilderness.

name: Overland Track
description: Tasmania's premier wilderness walk through ancient rainforests, alpine meadows and dramatic dolerite peaks.

name: Kungsleden
description: The King's Trail through Swedish Lapland's vast wilderness past Kebnekaise Sweden's highest peak.

name: Kilimanjaro Marangu Route
description: The only route with hut accommodation up Africa's highest peak through five distinct climate zones.

name: Simien Mountains Trek
description: Dramatic highland plateau with Gelada baboons, Ethiopian wolves and views over ancient escarpments.

name: Atlas Mountains Trek
description: Trekking through Berber villages and walnut groves to Toubkal North Africa's highest peak at 4167m.

name: Annapurna Base Camp Trek
description: Trek to the base of Annapurna I through rhododendron forests and Gurung villages to a breathtaking amphitheatre.

name: Gosaikunda Lake Trek
description: Sacred Shiva lake at 4380m where Hindu pilgrims bathe during Janai Purnima festival each year.

name: Stok Kangri Trek
description: Summit trek to 6153m peak near Leh offering 360-degree views of the Ladakh and Zanskar ranges.

name: Tarsar Marsar Trek
description: Hidden twin alpine lakes in Kashmir's Lidder valley surrounded by flower-filled meadows and pine forests.

name: Kashmir Great Lakes Trek
description: Seven pristine alpine lakes connected by high mountain passes in the most beautiful trek in Kashmir.

name: Brahmatal Trek
description: Winter high-altitude trek with stunning frozen lake and panoramic views of Trishul and Nanda Ghunti.

name: Kuari Pass Trek
description: Lord Curzon's trail offering stunning views of Nanda Devi and other Garhwal Himalayan peaks.

name: Dayara Bugyal Trek
description: India's finest high-altitude meadow turns into a snow wonderland perfect for beginners in winter.

name: Har Ki Dun Trek
description: Cradle of civilization trek to a valley mentioned in the Mahabharata with ancient wooden temples.

name: Rupin Pass Trek
description: Spectacular trek with a dramatic frozen waterfall crossing at the Rupin Pass at 4650m.

name: Patagonia Circuit Trek
description: Remote circuit around Torres del Paine visiting glaciers and valleys inaccessible by any other means.

name: Huayhuash Circuit
description: Remote Peruvian circuit past turquoise lakes and glaciated peaks in arguably the world's most beautiful trek.

name: Mount Rinjani Trek
description: Volcano summit trek in Lombok with crater lake and stunning views across to Bali and Sumbawa.

name: Adam's Peak Trek
description: Night trek to Sri Lanka's sacred footprint summit to witness one of the world's most stunning sunrises.

name: Annapurna Sanctuary Trek
description: Autumn trek into the natural amphitheatre surrounded by 360 degrees of 7000m Himalayan peaks.

name: Snowman Trek
description: The world's hardest trek crossing 11 passes above 4000m through Bhutan's remote northern highlands.

name: Markha Valley to Nimaling
description: Extended Ladakh trek through remote villages to the high meadow of Nimaling beneath Kang Yatse.

name: Miyar Valley Trek
description: Remote Himachal Pradesh valley trek to the Chhudong glacier with pristine wilderness and no crowds.

name: Zanskar Valley Trek
description: Remote high-altitude valley trek with ancient monasteries, turquoise rivers and dramatic gorges.

name: Satopanth Lake Trek
description: Sacred Himalayan lake at 4600m associated with Hindu trinity with stunning views of glaciated peaks.

name: Singalila Ridge Trek
description: Forested ridge walk on the India-Nepal border with views of four 8000m peaks including Everest and Kangchenjunga.

name: Chembra Peak Trek
description: Heart-shaped lake trek in Kerala's Wayanad hills with views over the Western Ghats tea estates.

name: Meesapulimala Trek
description: Kerala's second highest peak through shola forests and grasslands with rare Nilgiri Tahr sightings.

name: Kumara Parvatha Trek
description: Challenging Western Ghats summit trek through dense Pushpagiri forests with panoramic coastal views.

name: Kodachadri Trek
description: Western Ghats peak trek through pristine forests to a temple summit with sunset views over the Arabian Sea.

name: Bibbulmun Track
description: Epic 1000km trail through Western Australia's diverse landscapes from Perth to Albany.

name: Tongariro Alpine Crossing
description: New Zealand's most popular day walk past active volcanoes, emerald lakes and lunar landscapes.

name: Routeburn Track
description: Multi-day alpine track through two national parks with stunning lake and mountain panoramas.

name: West Highland Way
description: Scotland's classic long-distance walk from Glasgow through highland lochs and glens to Fort William.

name: Haute Route
description: Classic Alpine traverse from Chamonix to Zermatt crossing remote high mountain passes above 3000m.

name: Dolomites Alta Via 1
description: Classic high route through Italy's UNESCO-listed Dolomites with dramatic rock towers and alpine huts.

name: Fimmvorduhals Trek
description: Challenging Icelandic trek past the 2010 volcanic eruption site connecting two iconic Icelandic trails.

name: Kangchenjunga Base Camp Trek
description: Remote eastern Nepal trek to the base of the world's third highest mountain through pristine wilderness.

name: Dolpo Trek
description: Remote Himalayan wilderness trek into the hidden land of Dolpo featured in Peter Matthiessen's Snow Leopard.

name: Dzongri Trek
description: Sikkim's most popular trek with rhododendron forests and stunning views of Kangchenjunga.

name: Goecha La Trek
description: Sikkim's ultimate trek to the viewpoint of Kangchenjunga's south face at 4940m.

name: Nanda Devi Base Camp
description: Trek into the Nanda Devi Sanctuary biosphere reserve surrounding India's second highest peak.

name: Nagarkot Sunrise Trek
description: Easy one-day trek near Kathmandu with stunning sunrise views of the entire Himalayan range.

name: Kumano Kodo Pilgrimage
description: Ancient Japanese pilgrimage routes through Wakayama's sacred forests to three grand shrines.

name: Tiger's Nest Hike
description: Bhutan's iconic hike to the monastery perched on a 900m cliff face above the Paro Valley.

name: Salkantay Trek
description: Alternative route to Machu Picchu past the sacred Salkantay glacier at 4600m through cloud forest.

name: Drakensberg Amphitheatre
description: Chain ladder ascent to one of the world's largest cliff faces with views of the Tugela waterfall.

name: Rwenzori Mountains Trek
description: Trek through the legendary Mountains of the Moon past glaciers and giant lobelias to Margherita Peak.

name: Fansipan Trek
description: Trek to the Roof of Indochina at 3143m through Hoang Lien Son mountain forest near Sapa.

name: Volcan Acatenango Trek
description: Overnight trek to camp near the summit watching active Volcan de Fuego erupt just 4km away.

name: Hallasan Crater Trek
description: Day trek to South Korea's highest peak and crater lake on Jeju Island through azalea meadows.

name: Deosai Plains Trek
description: Trekking the world's second highest plateau at 4114m with Himalayan brown bears and wildflowers.
